comments_critique.summary: The discussion briefly notes a typo in the slides of the referenced LCA problem paper and provides a link to a preprint version of the paper for reference.

comments.author: remywang
comments.text:
Spoiler alert: there is at least one typo in the slides.

A preprint of the paper is available here: https://web.archive.org/web/20250708141740/https://www.ics.u...
